{{Quote|Who are you? What is this? Guards!|Supreme Chancellor Sidrona|<ref name="TotJSithWar" />}}
The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] had '''guards''' who protected the [[Senate Hall]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. They wore brown helmets and green robes, and were armed with [[Force pike/Legends|force pikes]].<ref name="TotJSithWar" />

The guards were present during the [[Trial of Ulic Qel-Droma|trial]] of [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] in [[3996 BBY]] and escorted Qel-Droma in front of the court. When the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] interrupted the trial, [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Sidrona]] called the guards to seize him however, the guards were [[Qâzoi Kyantuska|frozen]] by the Sith Lord as were many others present.<ref name="TotJSithWar" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 3]] {{1st}}
